coverage_label: synthetic deterministic compatibility only; no subjective TTS quality claim

runtime.python_3_14_compatibility: not selected; Python 3.13.4 was available and used

selection_rule: lowest CER among local-only candidates with 10/10 non-empty, warm RTF <= 1.0, RSS <= 8 GiB, and network-deny success; ties break by warm RTF then warm latency

candidates.name: mlx-whisper-large-v3-turbo
candidates.license_note: mlx-whisper package MIT; checkpoint follows upstream model-card terms; weights not redistributed

candidates.name: qwen3-asr-0.6b-8bit
candidates.license_note: mlx-audio package MIT; Qwen3-ASR checkpoint Apache-2.0 upstream; weights not redistributed

candidates.name: whisper.cpp
candidates.reason: Homebrew whisper-cli is installed, but no GGML model file is cached or bundled

tts_candidates.name: macos-say
tts_candidates.license_note: macOS system component; no model redistribution

tts_candidates.name: supertonic-3
tts_candidates.license_note: upstream code MIT; model weights OpenRAIL-M; no local runtime/weights were cached
tts_candidates.reason: Supertonic 3 runtime and Korean model weights are not installed or cached

fallback.reason: explicit fallback when no candidate satisfies the gate; whisper.cpp still requires a separately provisioned GGML model

cleanup.benchmark_temp_audio: TemporaryDirectory removed after each TTS run; no raw audio written
cleanup.model_weights: not tracked; cache paths are ignored
